sdk: @nehloo/graphnosis — runs produced at commit a27c400 (v0.7.1); TF-IDF retrieval path unchanged through the published v0.7.2 (48785ba), its direct descendant
note: Sanitized: dataset question/gold text removed; question_id keys to the public dataset. Our predictions + judge verdicts retained.
flag_semantics: run.ts parses a flag with no following value as the string 'true' (e.g. bare '--enable-router' enables it). Do NOT write '--enable-router=true' — the parser does not split on '=', so that form leaves the flag unset (false). Defaults that matter: --answer-model defaults to gpt-4o-mini, --retrieval to tfidf, --judge to gpt-4o, --max-nodes to 30; --enable-router / --enable-session-summaries / --enable-preference-extraction all default false. '--ollama' points the answer model at http://localhost:11434/v1. '--label-run' only renames the output folder and does not affect the score.
verify: From benchmarks/evidence/: `shasum -a 256 -c checksums.txt` confirms file integrity; `grep -c '"correct":true' <file>` reproduces each numerator against the 500 public question_ids.

runs.description: 78.00% — §12.2/12.3 cloud-paired headline (results 30): hybrid retrieval (cloud embeddings) + GPT-4o answers + gpt-4o-mini session summaries & preference extraction.
64.60% — §12.2 zero-embedding-API (table0-tfidf-full): the 78.00% config with cloud embeddings removed (hybrid → tfidf). Isolates the embedding contribution at +11.8 points.
runs.command_provenance: inferred — 78.00% config minus embeddings; matches the run's logged 'router+summaries+prefs' folder hint

runs.description: 62.20% — §12.2/12.4 TF-IDF graph + GPT-4o, enrichment off (ablation-gpt4o-noenrich): the 64.60% config minus session summaries & preference extraction (the +2.4-point enrichment delta). This is the graph arm of the §12.4 retrieval ablation.
runs.command_provenance: inferred — 64.60% config minus summaries/prefs; matches the author's session note 'TF-IDF + gpt-4o + router, enrichment off'

runs.description: 41.60% — §12.2 fully on-device (offline-full): the 62.20% config with the answer model swapped GPT-4o → Llama 3.2 3B via Ollama (the +20.6-point answer-model delta). Zero cloud. 8 questions errored (Ollama generation failures), counted as incorrect.
runs.command_provenance: inferred — 62.20% config with answer model swapped to llama3.2:3b on Ollama; matches the 'llama3.2:3b-tfidf router' folder hint

runs.description: 44.80% — §12.4 ablation (results 28): naïve top-k retrieval, GPT-4o, no graph traversal. The graph structure is worth +17.4 points over this.
22.60% — §12.4 ablation (results 29): full history concatenated, GPT-4o, no retrieval. 9 questions overflowed the context window and failed outright.
